title: Building a Knowledge Sharing Web Platform
shortDesc: Creating a modern content platform (Medium analog). Publish your experience, tutorials, and case studies while interacting with experts worldwide.
goalDesc: To design and develop a scalable web platform providing user-friendly tools for creating, formatting, and distributing text content with social network elements.
tasksSubtitle: Main tasks solved within the project scope

tasks.title: Market Analysis
tasks.desc: Comparative analysis of existing platforms (Medium, Dev.to).

tasks.title: DB Architecture
tasks.desc: Database design for storing articles, tags, and comments.

tasks.title: Editor Integration
tasks.desc: Fully-featured WYSIWYG editor for writing materials.

tasks.title: Smart Recommendations
tasks.desc: Personalized recommendation system based on user interests.

tasks.title: UI/UX Design
tasks.desc: Development of a responsive and accessible user interface.

expectedDesc: A functioning web application supporting author registration, rich-text publications, subscriptions, likes, and comments.
author: Student: Olena Shchipina
